'''Malia''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. She grew up in the lower levels of the planet-wide city during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], fighting to survive. However, her luck changed for the better when she got a job at the [[Rose Nebula]]. She worked as a relaxation specialist and [[Spy/Legends|spy]].
